# Processed Data

This folder contains the processed CSV outputs generated during the Parkinson's voice-based motor_UPDRS analysis project.

The files in this folder are not manually created. They are generated by running the R scripts from the project root in the correct order.

## Purpose of this folder

The `data/processed/` folder stores cleaned data, summary tables, correlation outputs, model predictions, model evaluation metrics, and model comparison results. These files are used by the analysis and visualization scripts.

## Generated files

| File | Generated by | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `cleaned_parkinsons.csv` | `scripts/01_data_cleaning.R` | Cleaned version of the original Parkinson's Telemonitoring dataset. Column names are converted into valid R names, for example `subject#` becomes `subject.`. |
| `motor_updrs_by_sex.csv` | `scripts/02_exploratory_analysis.R` | Descriptive statistics of `motor_UPDRS` grouped by sex, including sample size, mean, median, and standard deviation. |
| `correlations_with_motor_updrs.csv` | `scripts/03_correlation_analysis.R` | Correlation values between all numeric variables and the target variable `motor_UPDRS`. |
| `selected_feature_correlations.csv` | `scripts/03_correlation_analysis.R` | Correlations between selected voice-related predictors and `motor_UPDRS`. The selected variables are `PPE`, `Shimmer.APQ11`, `Jitter.RAP`, and `HNR`. |
| `linear_regression_predictions.csv` | `scripts/04_linear_regression.R` | Actual and predicted `motor_UPDRS` values from the linear regression model. |
| `linear_regression_metrics.csv` | `scripts/04_linear_regression.R` | Evaluation metrics for the linear regression model, including RMSE and R². |
| `linear_regression_vif.csv` | `scripts/04_linear_regression.R` | Variance Inflation Factor values used to assess multicollinearity among the linear regression predictors. |
| `random_forest_predictions.csv` | `scripts/05_random_forest_model.R` | Actual and predicted `motor_UPDRS` values from the Random Forest regression model. |
| `random_forest_feature_importance.csv` | `scripts/05_random_forest_model.R` | Random Forest feature importance values based on increase in node purity. |
| `random_forest_metrics.csv` | `scripts/05_random_forest_model.R` | Evaluation metrics for the Random Forest model, including RMSE and R². |
| `model_comparison.csv` | `scripts/05_random_forest_model.R` | Comparison of Linear Regression and Random Forest model performance. This file is created when `linear_regression_metrics.csv` already exists. |

## How to generate the processed files

From the root folder of the project, run the scripts in this order:

```r
source("packages.R")
source("scripts/01_data_cleaning.R")
source("scripts/02_exploratory_analysis.R")
source("scripts/03_correlation_analysis.R")
source("scripts/04_linear_regression.R")
source("scripts/05_random_forest_model.R")
```

The visualization script can be run after these files have been generated:

```r
source("scripts/06_visualizations.R")
```

## Input data requirement

The raw dataset must be available at:

```text
data/raw/parkinsons_updrs.csv
```

The original dataset description file can be stored at:

```text
data/raw/parkinsons_updrs.names
```

## Notes

- The target variable of the project is `motor_UPDRS`.
- The main predictors used in the regression models are `PPE`, `Shimmer.APQ11`, `Jitter.RAP`, `HNR`, `age`, and `sex`.
- The train/test split is performed by subject, using `set.seed(42)`, so the same patient does not appear in both the training and test sets.
- This folder should contain generated outputs only. Raw data should remain in `data/raw/`.
